shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale within the warm cage scene.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering and 1px outlines keep interaction targets crisp.
differences: This asset marks the cleanup target on the cage floor.
The silhouette stays readable at 2x2px without resembling the seed item.
The color mix supports quick contrast against the floor layer.

reference_images.label: poop_object_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds cleanup target scale, color usage, and floor readability constraints.

reference_images.label: care_system_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds cleaning interaction and sparkle follow-up feedback.

reference_images.label: cage_object_reference
reference_images.purpose: Grounds cage-prop placement and relative scale inside the 128x128 enclosure.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Static sprite entity with fixed virtual-pixel scaling.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load item_poop_2x2.png via AssetServer during Loading state, then bind handles by task_id for deterministic system lookup.
runtime_notes: Use nearest-neighbor sampling and a 128x128 virtual canvas so every authored pixel remains crisp after upscale.
Drive state swaps through atlas index changes or visibility toggles instead of runtime repainting to preserve palette invariance.
Attach marker components so CareSystem, BehaviorSystem, TimeSystem, and HUD systems can target the asset without filename inference.

context.usage: Randomly spawned on floor; removed by swipe-to-clean.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite is exactly 2x2px and uses #AB5236 for all 4 pixels.
Remains visible on floor colors (#FFA300, #FFF1E8) by being a solid 2x2 block.
Background is fully transparent outside the 2x2 bounds.
